000044  1c00              DCB      0x1c,0x00
;;;4913               {
;;;4914                   case eSetBits:
;;;4915                       pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] |= ulValue;

00004a  f8500025          LDR      r0,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
00004e  4330              ORRS     r0,r0,r6
000050  f1040158          ADD      r1,r4,#0x58
000054  f8410025          STR      r0,[r1,r5,LSL #2]
;;;4916                       break;
000058  e01b              B        |L50.146|
;;;4917   
;;;4918                   case eIncrement:
;;;4919                       ( pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] )++;

00005e  f8500025          LDR      r0,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
000062  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000064  f1040158          ADD      r1,r4,#0x58
000068  f8410025          STR      r0,[r1,r5,LSL #2]
;;;4920                       break;
00006c  e011              B        |L50.146|
;;;4921   
;;;4922                   case eSetValueWithOverwrite:
;;;4923                       pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] = ulValue;

000072  f8406025          STR      r6,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
;;;4924                       break;
000076  e00c              B        |L50.146|
;;;4925   
;;;4926                   case eSetValueWithoutOverwrite:
;;;4927   
;;;4928                       if( ucOriginalNotifyState != taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED )

00007c  d004              BEQ      |L50.136|
;;;4929                       {
;;;4930                           pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] = ulValue;

000082  f8406025          STR      r6,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
000086  e001              B        |L50.140|
                  |L50.136|
;;;4931                       }
;;;4932                       else
;;;4933                       {
;;;4934                           /* The value could not be written to the task. */
;;;4935                           xReturn = pdFAIL;
000088  f04f0b00          MOV      r11,#0
                  |L50.140|
;;;4936                       }
;;;4937   
;;;4938                       break;
00008c  e001              B        |L50.146|
;;;4939   
;;;4940                   case eNoAction:
;;;4941   
;;;4942                       /* The task is being notified without its notify value being
;;;4943                        * updated. */
;;;4944                       break;
00008e  e000              B        |L50.146|
                  |L50.144|
;;;4945   
;;;4946                   default:
;;;4947   
;;;4948                       /* Should not get here if all enums are handled.
;;;4949                        * Artificially force an assert by testing a value the
;;;4950                        * compiler can't assume is const. */
;;;4951                       configASSERT( xTickCount == ( TickType_t ) 0 );
;;;4952   
;;;4953                       break;
000090  bf00              NOP      
                  |L50.146|
000092  bf00              NOP                            ;4916
;;;4954               }
;;;4955   
;;;4956               traceTASK_NOTIFY( uxIndexToNotify );
;;;4957   
;;;4958               /* If the task is in the blocked state specifically to wait for a
;;;4959                * notification then unblock it now. */
;;;4960               if( ucOriginalNotifyState == taskWAITING_NOTIFICATION )
000094  f1b80f01          CMP      r8,#1
000098  d122              BNE      |L50.224|
;;;4961               {
;;;4962                   ( void ) uxListRemove( &( pxTCB->xStateListItem ) );
00009a  1d20              ADDS     r0,r4,#4
00009c  f7fffffe          BL       uxListRemove
;;;4963                   prvAddTaskToReadyList( pxTCB );
0000a0  f894102c          LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x2c]
0000a4  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000a6  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1
0000a8  4910              LDR      r1,|L50.236|
0000aa  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; uxTopReadyPriority
0000ac  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
0000ae  490f              LDR      r1,|L50.236|
0000b0  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; uxTopReadyPriority
0000b2  6ae1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x2c]
0000b4  eb010181          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #2
0000b8  4a0d              LDR      r2,|L50.240|
0000ba  eb020081          ADD      r0,r2,r1,LSL #2
0000be  1d21              ADDS     r1,r4,#4
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       vListInsertEnd
;;;4964   
;;;4965                   /* The task should not have been on an event list. */
;;;4966                   configASSERT( listLIST_ITEM_CONTAINER( &( pxTCB->xEventListItem ) ) == NULL );
;;;4967   
;;;4968                   #if ( configUSE_TICKLESS_IDLE != 0 )
;;;4969                       {
;;;4970                           /* If a task is blocked waiting for a notification then
;;;4971                            * xNextTaskUnblockTime might be set to the blocked task's time
;;;4972                            * out time.  If the task is unblocked for a reason other than
;;;4973                            * a timeout xNextTaskUnblockTime is normally left unchanged,
;;;4974                            * because it will automatically get reset to a new value when
;;;4975                            * the tick count equals xNextTaskUnblockTime.  However if
;;;4976                            * tickless idling is used it might be more important to enter
;;;4977                            * sleep mode at the earliest possible time - so reset
;;;4978                            * xNextTaskUnblockTime here to ensure it is updated at the
;;;4979                            * earliest possible time. */
;;;4980                           prvResetNextTaskUnblockTime();
;;;4981                       }
;;;4982                   #endif
;;;4983   
;;;4984                   if( pxTCB->uxPriority > pxCurrentTCB->uxPriority )
0000c4  490b              LDR      r1,|L50.244|
0000c6  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]
0000c8  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
0000ca  6ac9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x2c]
0000cc  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000ce  d907              BLS      |L50.224|
;;;4985                   {
;;;4986                       /* The notified task has a priority above the currently
;;;4987                        * executing task so a yield is required. */
;;;4988                       taskYIELD_IF_USING_PREEMPTION();

0000d4  4908              LDR      r1,|L50.248|
0000d6  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
0000d8  f3bf8f4f          DSB      
0000dc  f3bf8f6f          ISB      
                  |L50.224|
;;;4989                   }
;;;4990                   else
;;;4991                   {
;;;4992                       mtCOVERAGE_TEST_MARKER();
;;;4993                   }
;;;4994               }
;;;4995               else
;;;4996               {
;;;4997                   mtCOVERAGE_TEST_MARKER();
;;;4998               }
;;;4999           }
;;;5000           taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
0000e0  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;5001   
;;;5002           return xReturn;
0000e4  4658              MOV      r0,r11
;;;5003       }
0000e6  e8bd9ff0          POP      {r4-r12,pc}

                          AREA ||i.xTaskGenericNotifyFromISR||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  xTaskGenericNotifyFromISR PROC
;;;5009   
;;;5010       BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyFromISR( TaskHandle_t xTaskToNotify,
000000  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;5011                                             UBaseType_t uxIndexToNotify,
;;;5012                                             uint32_t ulValue,
;;;5013                                             eNotifyAction eAction,
;;;5014                                             uint32_t * pulPreviousNotificationValue,
;;;5015                                             BaseType_t * pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken )
;;;5016       {
000004  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
000008  4616              MOV      r6,r2
00000a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
00000c  f8ddb028          LDR      r11,[sp,#0x28]
;;;5017           TCB_t * pxTCB;
;;;5018           uint8_t ucOriginalNotifyState;
;;;5019           BaseType_t xReturn = pdPASS;
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000012  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;5020           UBaseType_t uxSavedInterruptStatus;
;;;5021   
;;;5022           configASSERT( xTaskToNotify );
;;;5023           configASSERT( uxIndexToNotify < configTASK_NOTIFICATION_ARRAY_ENTRIES );
;;;5024   
;;;5025           /* RTOS ports that support interrupt nesting have the concept of a
;;;5026            * maximum  system call (or maximum API call) interrupt priority.
;;;5027            * Interrupts that are  above the maximum system call priority are keep
;;;5028            * permanently enabled, even when the RTOS kernel is in a critical section,
;;;5029            * but cannot make any calls to FreeRTOS API functions.  If configASSERT()
;;;5030            * is defined in FreeRTOSConfig.h then
;;;5031            * portASSERT_IF_INTERRUPT_PRIORITY_INVALID() will result in an assertion
;;;5032            * failure if a FreeRTOS API function is called from an interrupt that has
;;;5033            * been assigned a priority above the configured maximum system call
;;;5034            * priority.  Only FreeRTOS functions that end in FromISR can be called
;;;5035            * from interrupts  that have been assigned a priority at or (logically)
;;;5036            * below the maximum system call interrupt priority.  FreeRTOS maintains a
;;;5037            * separate interrupt safe API to ensure interrupt entry is as fast and as
;;;5038            * simple as possible.  More information (albeit Cortex-M specific) is
;;;5039            * provided on the following link:
;;;5040            * https://www.FreeRTOS.org/RTOS-Cortex-M3-M4.html */
;;;5041           portASSERT_IF_INTERRUPT_PRIORITY_INVALID();
;;;5042   
;;;5043           pxTCB = xTaskToNotify;
000014  4654              MOV      r4,r10
;;;5044   
;;;5045           uxSavedInterruptStatus = portSET_INTERRUPT_MASK_FROM_ISR();
000016  bf00              NOP      
000018  21bf              MOVS     r1,#0xbf
00001a  f3ef8011          MRS      r0,BASEPRI
00001e  f3818811          MSR      BASEPRI,r1
000022  f3bf8f4f          DSB      
000026  f3bf8f6f          ISB      
00002a  bf00              NOP      
00002c  4681              MOV      r9,r0
;;;5046           {
;;;5047               if( pulPreviousNotificationValue != NULL )
00002e  f1bb0f00          CMP      r11,#0
000032  d005              BEQ      |L51.64|
;;;5048               {
;;;5049                   *pulPreviousNotificationValue = pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ];
000034  f1040058          ADD      r0,r4,#0x58
000038  f8500025          LDR      r0,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
00003c  f8cb0000          STR      r0,[r11,#0]
                  |L51.64|
;;;5050               }
;;;5051   
;;;5052               ucOriginalNotifyState = pxTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToNotify ];
000040  f104005c          ADD      r0,r4,#0x5c
000044  f8108005          LDRB     r8,[r0,r5]
;;;5053               pxTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToNotify ] = taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED;
000048  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
00004a  5541              STRB     r1,[r0,r5]
;;;5054   
;;;5055               switch( eAction )
00004c  2f05              CMP      r7,#5
00004e  d229              BCS      |L51.164|
000050  e8dff007          TBB      [pc,r7]
000054  27030d17          DCB      0x27,0x03,0x0d,0x17
000058  1c00              DCB      0x1c,0x00
;;;5056               {
;;;5057                   case eSetBits:
;;;5058                       pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] |= ulValue;
00005a  f1040058          ADD      r0,r4,#0x58
00005e  f8500025          LDR      r0,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
000062  4330              ORRS     r0,r0,r6
000064  f1040158          ADD      r1,r4,#0x58
000068  f8410025          STR      r0,[r1,r5,LSL #2]
;;;5059                       break;
00006c  e01b              B        |L51.166|
;;;5060   
;;;5061                   case eIncrement:
;;;5062                       ( pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] )++;
00006e  f1040058          ADD      r0,r4,#0x58
000072  f8500025          LDR      r0,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
000076  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000078  f1040158          ADD      r1,r4,#0x58
00007c  f8410025          STR      r0,[r1,r5,LSL #2]
;;;5063                       break;
000080  e011              B        |L51.166|
;;;5064   
;;;5065                   case eSetValueWithOverwrite:
;;;5066                       pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] = ulValue;
000082  f1040058          ADD      r0,r4,#0x58
000086  f8406025          STR      r6,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
;;;5067                       break;
00008a  e00c              B        |L51.166|
;;;5068   
;;;5069                   case eSetValueWithoutOverwrite:
;;;5070   
;;;5071                       if( ucOriginalNotifyState != taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED )
00008c  f1b80f02          CMP      r8,#2
000090  d004              BEQ      |L51.156|
;;;5072                       {
;;;5073                           pxTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToNotify ] = ulValue;
000092  f1040058          ADD      r0,r4,#0x58
000096  f8406025          STR      r6,[r0,r5,LSL #2]
00009a  e001              B        |L51.160|
                  |L51.156|
;;;5074                       }
;;;5075                       else
;;;5076                       {
;;;5077                           /* The value could not be written to the task. */
;;;5078                           xReturn = pdFAIL;
00009c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00009e  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
                  |L51.160|
;;;5079                       }
;;;5080   
;;;5081                       break;
0000a0  e001              B        |L51.166|
;;;5082   
;;;5083                   case eNoAction:
;;;5084   
;;;5085                       /* The task is being notified without its notify value being
;;;5086                        * updated. */
;;;5087                       break;
0000a2  e000              B        |L51.166|
                  |L51.164|
;;;5088   
;;;5089                   default:
;;;5090   
;;;5091                       /* Should not get here if all enums are handled.
;;;5092                        * Artificially force an assert by testing a value the
;;;5093                        * compiler can't assume is const. */
;;;5094                       configASSERT( xTickCount == ( TickType_t ) 0 );
;;;5095                       break;
0000a4  bf00              NOP      
                  |L51.166|
0000a6  bf00              NOP                            ;5059
;;;5096               }
;;;5097   
;;;5098               traceTASK_NOTIFY_FROM_ISR( uxIndexToNotify );
;;;5099   
;;;5100               /* If the task is in the blocked state specifically to wait for a
;;;5101                * notification then unblock it now. */
;;;5102               if( ucOriginalNotifyState == taskWAITING_NOTIFICATION )
0000a8  f1b80f01          CMP      r8,#1
0000ac  d12b              BNE      |L51.262|
;;;5103               {
;;;5104                   /* The task should not have been on an event list. */
;;;5105                   configASSERT( listLIST_ITEM_CONTAINER( &( pxTCB->xEventListItem ) ) == NULL );
;;;5106   
;;;5107                   if( uxSchedulerSuspended == ( UBaseType_t ) pdFALSE )
0000ae  4819              LDR      r0,|L51.276|
0000b0  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; uxSchedulerSuspended
0000b2  b9a8              CBNZ     r0,|L51.224|
;;;5108                   {
;;;5109                       ( void ) uxListRemove( &( pxTCB->xStateListItem ) );
0000b4  1d20              ADDS     r0,r4,#4
0000b6  f7fffffe          BL       uxListRemove
;;;5110                       prvAddTaskToReadyList( pxTCB );
0000ba  f894102c          LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x2c]
0000be  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000c0  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1
0000c2  4915              LDR      r1,|L51.280|
0000c4  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; uxTopReadyPriority
0000c6  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
0000c8  4913              LDR      r1,|L51.280|
0000ca  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; uxTopReadyPriority
0000cc  6ae1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x2c]
0000ce  eb010181          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #2
0000d2  4a12              LDR      r2,|L51.284|
0000d4  eb020081          ADD      r0,r2,r1,LSL #2
0000d8  1d21              ADDS     r1,r4,#4
0000da  f7fffffe          BL       vListInsertEnd
0000de  e004              B        |L51.234|
                  |L51.224|
;;;5111                   }
;;;5112                   else
;;;5113                   {
;;;5114                       /* The delayed and ready lists cannot be accessed, so hold
;;;5115                        * this task pending until the scheduler is resumed. */
;;;5116                       vListInsertEnd( &( xPendingReadyList ), &( pxTCB->xEventListItem ) );

0000e4  480e              LDR      r0,|L51.288|
0000e6  f7fffffe          BL       vListInsertEnd
                  |L51.234|
;;;5117                   }
;;;5118   
;;;5119                   if( pxTCB->uxPriority > pxCurrentTCB->uxPriority )
0000ea  490e              LDR      r1,|L51.292|
0000ec  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]
0000ee  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
0000f0  6ac9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x2c]
0000f2  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000f4  d907              BLS      |L51.262|
;;;5120                   {
;;;5121                       /* The notified task has a priority above the currently
;;;5122                        * executing task so a yield is required. */
;;;5123                       if( pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken != NULL )
0000f6  980b              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x2c]

;;;5124                       {
;;;5125                           *pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken = pdTRUE;
0000fa  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
0000fc  980b              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x2c]
0000fe  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L51.256|
;;;5126                       }
;;;5127   
;;;5128                       /* Mark that a yield is pending in case the user is not
;;;5129                        * using the "xHigherPriorityTaskWoken" parameter to an ISR
;;;5130                        * safe FreeRTOS function. */
;;;5131                       xYieldPending = pdTRUE;

                  |L51.262|
;;;5132                   }
;;;5133                   else
;;;5134                   {
;;;5135                       mtCOVERAGE_TEST_MARKER();
;;;5136                   }
;;;5137               }
;;;5138           }
;;;5139           portCLEAR_INTERRUPT_MASK_FROM_ISR( uxSavedInterruptStatus );
000106  bf00              NOP      
000108  f3898811          MSR      BASEPRI,r9
00010c  bf00              NOP      
;;;5140   
;;;5141           return xReturn;
00010e  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;5142       }
000110  e8bd8ff8          POP      {r3-r11,pc}
;;;5143   
                          ENDP

                  |L51.276|
                          DCD      uxSchedulerSuspended
                  |L51.280|
                          DCD      uxTopReadyPriority
                  |L51.284|
                          DCD      pxReadyTasksLists
                  |L51.288|
                          DCD      xPendingReadyList
                  |L51.292|
                          DCD      pxCurrentTCB
                  |L51.296|
                          DCD      xYieldPending

                          AREA ||i.xTaskGenericNotifyStateClear||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  xTaskGenericNotifyStateClear PROC
;;;5237   
;;;5238       BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyStateClear( TaskHandle_t xTask,
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;5239                                                UBaseType_t uxIndexToClear )
;;;5240       {
000004  4606              MOV      r6,r0
000006  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;5241           TCB_t * pxTCB;
;;;5242           BaseType_t xReturn;
;;;5243   
;;;5244           configASSERT( uxIndexToClear < configTASK_NOTIFICATION_ARRAY_ENTRIES );
;;;5245   
;;;5246           /* If null is passed in here then it is the calling task that is having
;;;5247            * its notification state cleared. */
;;;5248           pxTCB = prvGetTCBFromHandle( xTask );
000008  b916              CBNZ     r6,|L52.16|
00000a  480c              LDR      r0,|L52.60|
00000c  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
00000e  e000              B        |L52.18|
                  |L52.16|
000010  4630              MOV      r0,r6
                  |L52.18|
000012  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;5249   
;;;5250           taskENTER_CRITICAL();
000014  f7fffffe          BL       vPortEnterCritical
;;;5251           {
;;;5252               if( pxTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToClear ] == taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED )
000018  f107005c          ADD      r0,r7,#0x5c
00001c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00001e  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000020  d105              BNE      |L52.46|
;;;5253               {
;;;5254                   pxTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToClear ] = taskNOT_WAITING_NOTIFICATION;
000022  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000024  f107005c          ADD      r0,r7,#0x5c
000028  5501              STRB     r1,[r0,r4]
;;;5255                   xReturn = pdPASS;
00002a  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
00002c  e000              B        |L52.48|
                  |L52.46|
;;;5256               }
;;;5257               else
;;;5258               {
;;;5259                   xReturn = pdFAIL;
00002e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L52.48|
;;;5260               }
;;;5261           }
;;;5262           taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
000030  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;5263   
;;;5264           return xReturn;
000034  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;5265       }
000036  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;5266   
                          ENDP

00003a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L52.60|
                          DCD      pxCurrentTCB

                          AREA ||i.xTaskGenericNotifyWait||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  xTaskGenericNotifyWait PROC
;;;4800   
;;;4801       BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyWait( UBaseType_t uxIndexToWait,
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;4802                                          uint32_t ulBitsToClearOnEntry,
;;;4803                                          uint32_t ulBitsToClearOnExit,
;;;4804                                          uint32_t * pulNotificationValue,
;;;4805                                          TickType_t xTicksToWait )
;;;4806       {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
000008  4690              MOV      r8,r2
00000a  461d              MOV      r5,r3
00000c  f8dd9020          LDR      r9,[sp,#0x20]
;;;4807           BaseType_t xReturn;
;;;4808   
;;;4809           configASSERT( uxIndexToWait < configTASK_NOTIFICATION_ARRAY_ENTRIES );
;;;4810   
;;;4811           taskENTER_CRITICAL();
000010  f7fffffe          BL       vPortEnterCritical
;;;4812           {
;;;4813               /* Only block if a notification is not already pending. */
;;;4814               if( pxCurrentTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToWait ] != taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED )
000014  4823              LDR      r0,|L53.164|
000016  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000018  305c              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x5c
00001a  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00001c  2802              CMP      r0,#2
00001e  d01a              BEQ      |L53.86|
;;;4815               {
;;;4816                   /* Clear bits in the task's notification value as bits may get
;;;4817                    * set  by the notifying task or interrupt.  This can be used to
;;;4818                    * clear the value to zero. */
;;;4819                   pxCurrentTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToWait ] &= ~ulBitsToClearOnEntry;
000020  4920              LDR      r1,|L53.164|
000022  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000024  3158              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x58
000026  eb010084          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #2
00002a  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00002c  43b9              BICS     r1,r1,r7
00002e  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
;;;4820   
;;;4821                   /* Mark this task as waiting for a notification. */
;;;4822                   pxCurrentTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToWait ] = taskWAITING_NOTIFICATION;
000030  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000032  481c              LDR      r0,|L53.164|
000034  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000036  305c              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x5c
000038  5501              STRB     r1,[r0,r4]
;;;4823   
;;;4824                   if( xTicksToWait > ( TickType_t ) 0 )
00003a  f1b90f00          CMP      r9,#0
00003e  d00a              BEQ      |L53.86|
;;;4825                   {
;;;4826                       prvAddCurrentTaskToDelayedList( xTicksToWait, pdTRUE );
000040  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000042  f7fffffe          BL       prvAddCurrentTaskToDelayedList
;;;4827                       traceTASK_NOTIFY_WAIT_BLOCK( uxIndexToWait );
;;;4828   
;;;4829                       /* All ports are written to allow a yield in a critical
;;;4830                        * section (some will yield immediately, others wait until the
;;;4831                        * critical section exits) - but it is not something that
;;;4832                        * application code should ever do. */
;;;4833                       portYIELD_WITHIN_API();
000046  f04f5080          MOV      r0,#0x10000000
00004a  4917              LDR      r1,|L53.168|
00004c  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
00004e  f3bf8f4f          DSB      
000052  f3bf8f6f          ISB      
                  |L53.86|
;;;4834                   }
;;;4835                   else
;;;4836                   {
;;;4837                       mtCOVERAGE_TEST_MARKER();
;;;4838                   }
;;;4839               }
;;;4840               else
;;;4841               {
;;;4842                   mtCOVERAGE_TEST_MARKER();
;;;4843               }
;;;4844           }
;;;4845           taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
000056  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;4846   
;;;4847           taskENTER_CRITICAL();
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       vPortEnterCritical
;;;4848           {
;;;4849               traceTASK_NOTIFY_WAIT( uxIndexToWait );
;;;4850   
;;;4851               if( pulNotificationValue != NULL )
00005e  b12d              CBZ      r5,|L53.108|
;;;4852               {
;;;4853                   /* Output the current notification value, which may or may not
;;;4854                    * have changed. */
;;;4855                   *pulNotificationValue = pxCurrentTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToWait ];
000060  4810              LDR      r0,|L53.164|
000062  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000064  3058              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x58
000066  f8500024          LDR      r0,[r0,r4,LSL #2]
00006a  6028              STR      r0,[r5,#0]
                  |L53.108|
;;;4856               }
;;;4857   
;;;4858               /* If ucNotifyValue is set then either the task never entered the
;;;4859                * blocked state (because a notification was already pending) or the
;;;4860                * task unblocked because of a notification.  Otherwise the task
;;;4861                * unblocked because of a timeout. */
;;;4862               if( pxCurrentTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToWait ] != taskNOTIFICATION_RECEIVED )
00006c  480d              LDR      r0,|L53.164|
00006e  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000070  305c              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x5c
000072  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000074  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000076  d001              BEQ      |L53.124|
;;;4863               {
;;;4864                   /* A notification was not received. */
;;;4865                   xReturn = pdFALSE;
000078  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00007a  e009              B        |L53.144|
                  |L53.124|
;;;4866               }
;;;4867               else
;;;4868               {
;;;4869                   /* A notification was already pending or a notification was
;;;4870                    * received while the task was waiting. */
;;;4871                   pxCurrentTCB->ulNotifiedValue[ uxIndexToWait ] &= ~ulBitsToClearOnExit;
00007c  4909              LDR      r1,|L53.164|
00007e  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000080  3158              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x58
000082  eb010084          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #2
000086  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
000088  ea210108          BIC      r1,r1,r8
00008c  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
;;;4872                   xReturn = pdTRUE;
00008e  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
                  |L53.144|
;;;4873               }
;;;4874   
;;;4875               pxCurrentTCB->ucNotifyState[ uxIndexToWait ] = taskNOT_WAITING_NOTIFICATION;
000090  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000092  4804              LDR      r0,|L53.164|
000094  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
000096  305c              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x5c
000098  5501              STRB     r1,[r0,r4]
;;;4876           }
;;;4877           taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
00009a  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;4878   
;;;4879           return xReturn;
00009e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
;;;4880       }
0000a0  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;4881   
                          ENDP

                  |L53.164|
                          DCD      pxCurrentTCB
                  |L53.168|
                          DCD      0xe000ed04

                          AREA ||i.xTaskGetCurrentTaskHandle||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  xTaskGetCurrentTaskHandle PROC
;;;4055   
;;;4056       TaskHandle_t xTaskGetCurrentTaskHandle( void )
000000  4901              LDR      r1,|L54.8|
;;;4057       {
;;;4058           TaskHandle_t xReturn;
;;;4059   
;;;4060           /* A critical section is not required as this is not called from
;;;4061            * an interrupt and the current TCB will always be the same for any
;;;4062            * individual execution thread. */
;;;4063           xReturn = pxCurrentTCB;
000002  6808              LDR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; pxCurrentTCB
;;;4064   
;;;4065           return xReturn;
;;;4066       }
000004  4770              BX       lr
;;;4067   
                          ENDP

000006  0000              DCW      0x0000
